content:
🚀 I'm #Hiring | Associate – Legal 🚀

We're looking for a proactive legal professional who thrives in a fast-paced environment and enjoys solving complex business challenges.

📌 Designation: Associate – Legal
📍 Location: Bangalore (On-site)
🧑‍💻 Experience: 3-6 Years
⏳ Notice Period: Immediate Joiners Preferred
📩 Apply here: https://lnkd.in/g_ufbxGt

What we're looking for:
✅ 3-6 years years of experience in legal, compliance, or contract management roles
✅ Strong understanding of corporate, commercial, and employment law principles
✅ Excellent drafting, review, and negotiation skills
✅ Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple priorities
✅ Effective communication and stakeholder management skills
✅ Ability to work independently in a dynamic and fast-paced environment

#Hiring #LegalJobs #AssociateLegal #LegalCareer #CorporateLaw #Compliance #Teachmint #BangaloreJobs #ImmediateJoiners

Preeta Saxena Debasmita Roy Anukriti Dwivedi ANKITHA K SHETTY Priya Singh
comment: Immediate joiner preference often skews out strong candidates on notice; in fast-paced legal teams, onboarding playbooks matter as much as drafting strength for consistency in reviews
